stemHtml: The descent speed schedule for an aircraft is 0.79/250 kt/246 kt. Due to a decrease in head wind, an aircraft is expected to arrive early and enter a holding pattern. In this case, the pilot should (1) _____ the cost index prior to arrival. The new speed schedule would be (2) _____, this would cause the aircraft to arrive (3) _____, and this would cause the fuel consumption to (4) _____.

options.a: (1) increase; (2) 0.80/260/250; (3) at the same time; (4) decrease
options.b: (1) maintain; (2) 0.79/250/246; (3) at the same time; (4) decrease
